title: Neomacfadya podopogon

The Celastraceae family is further divided into several subfamilies, including the Celastroideae and Zygophylloideae. Neomacfadya podopogon is specifically classified under the subfamily Celastroideae, which contains over 1,000 species. The exact classification of Neomacfadya podopogon can also be represented in a taxonomic hierarchy: Plantae > Magnoliophyta > Magnoliopsida > Celastrales > Celastraceae > Neomacfadya. This classification reflects the plant's evolutionary relationships and shared characteristics with other members of the Celastraceae family.
